name: CMP_TCS_PER_PERD_STMT_SEC_V
query: SELECT PER_PERD_STMT_ID, LOCAL_CURRENCY_CODE, PER_PERD_ID, STMT_ID, STMT_PERD_ID, PERD_RUN_ID, PERSON_ID, LEGAL_ENTITY_ID, ASSIGNMENT_ID, JOB_ID, WORKER_NUMBER, HIRE_DATE, XML_LOB_STMT, BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, HIDE_SUMMARY_FLAG, DSP_DETAIL_JOB_FLAG, REQUEST_ID, PROCESS_REQUEST_ID, JOB_DEFINITION_NAME, JOB_DEFINITION_PACKAGE, CREATED_BY, CREATION_DATE, LAST_UPDATE_DATE, LAST_UPDATED_BY, LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, POSITION_ID, SALARY_AMOUNT, SALARY_CURRENCY, SALARY_PERIOD_CODE, END_DATE, STMT_VIEWED_DATE , PRIME_ASSIGNMENT_ID, PRIME_ASSIGNMENT_DATE FROM CMP_TCS_PER_PERD_STMT
